title: Senior Doctor - GE Healthcare India Consulting Pvt Ltd - Experienced Professionals
company: GE Healthcare India Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - GE Healthcare India Consulting Pvt Ltd - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
GE Healthcare India Consulting Pvt Ltd has an exciting opening for a Senior Doctor at our Agra office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About GE Healthcare India Consulting Pvt Ltd:
GE Healthcare India Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Wound Care

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with GE Healthcare India Consulting Pvt Ltd!
